diagrams.title: Types of Functions - Mapping Diagram
diagrams.description: Visual representation of one-to-one, onto, and bijective functions using mapping arrows between sets
diagrams.purpose: Understand different function types through visual mapping

diagrams.title: Horizontal Line Test for One-to-One
diagrams.description: Graph showing how horizontal line test determines if function is one-to-one
elements: f(x)=x²: horizontal lines at y=4 intersect twice → NOT one-to-one
f(x)=x³: horizontal lines intersect once → ONE-TO-ONE
Key: horizontal line cuts graph at most once = injective

diagrams.title: Domain-Codomain-Range Relationship
diagrams.description: Venn diagram showing relationship between domain, codomain, and range

diagrams.title: Function Composition g∘f
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing composition of two functions
elements: Input a ∈ A → f(a) = b ∈ B → g(b) = c ∈ C
A→B via f, then B→C via g
